# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

default:
  image: alpine:3.19
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: 30 days

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - echo '#!/usr/bin/env sh' > dist/bin/app
    - echo 'echo Running application' >> dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo 'APP_ENV=shared' > dist/config/app.env
    - echo 'LOG_LEVEL=info' >> dist/config/app.env
    - tar -czf dist/build-output.tar.gz -C dist bin config
  artifacts:
    name: "build-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - dist/bin/
      - dist/config/
      - dist/build-output.tar.gz
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always

test:
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - test -f dist/bin/app
    - test -f dist/config/app.env
    - ./dist/bin/app

package:
  stage: package
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - mkdir -p release
    - cp dist/build-output.tar.gz release/
    - echo "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" > release/version.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "package-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - release/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: package
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build
    - package
  script:
    - test -f dist/bin/app
    - test -f dist/config/app.env
    - test -f release/build-output.tar.gz
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo "Deploying to staging using downloaded artifacts"
    - ./dist/bin/app
  environment:
    name: staging
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: package
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build
    - package
  script:
    - test -f dist/bin/app
    - test -f dist/config/app.env
    - test -f release/build-output.tar.gz
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo "Deploying to production using downloaded artifacts"
    - ./dist/bin/app
  environment:
    name: production
  when: manual
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
